text.title: Agentic Workflow and Prompt Patterns
text.summary: Recommended subagents, agentic pipeline design, and prompt patterns for violation triage and VPAT drafting.

section.title: Agentic Pipeline
section.p: A Claude subagent running as an accessibility automation pipeline can: trigger axe-core scans via Playwright, parse and prioritize violations by WCAG criterion and user impact, generate developer-facing remediation briefs with code fix suggestions, and draft VPAT sections. Human accessibility specialists own: AT testing validation, VPAT legal review, and closure of complex issues.

rule.statement: Custom caption-pipeline agent submits video to captioning API, polls for completion, validates output format, and delivers to content team — human reviews quality.
rule.rationale: Submission and polling are mechanical and repeatable; quality review requires human judgment about accuracy for accented speech and domain terminology.

list.item: a11y-ci-agent — triggered on PR, runs axe-core, posts violation summary as PR comment, fails PR on critical/serious violations
vpat-drafter agent — takes scan results + manual test notes, generates structured VPAT 2.5 draft in Markdown
caption-pipeline agent — submits video files to captioning API, polls for completion, validates output format

section.title: Prompt References
section.reference: Prompt for AI-assisted WCAG violation triage with before/after code fixes
Prompt for VPAT 2.5 Section 508 draft generation with human review flags
